what_was_done: Session 639: Diagnosed and fixed toolshed startup crash loop. Root cause: anyio BaseExceptionGroup (from streamablehttp_client TaskGroup) not caught by except clauses in connect_http/cleanup/startup. Added BaseExceptionGroup to 3 catch sites. Commit 1722742. Also identified mid-session shutdown race (MEDIUM, unfixed).

Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)

Toolshed mid-session shutdown race: uvicorn still processing requests after MCP session manager teardown (MEDIUM)
2 pre-existing test failures in toolshed: TestStdioBackend (test_spawn, test_cleanup)
next_steps: Rework MiniLM migration: run as offline batch (not during server startup), validate row counts before swapping
Fix 3 HIGH security issues (gate_02 rm -r, gate_17 type mismatch, gate_01 path traversal)
Fix MEDIUM security issues (unicode bypass, injection scan gap, LIVE_STATE guard)
Fix 2 stdio backend test failures in toolshed
